# Muhammad Ali Raza — Portfolio & Services (SMARNB)

> Freelance full-stack developer & designer. Python SaaS dashboards, Selenium &
> OCR automation, computer vision, Figma UI/UX, and product packaging — delivered
> on time, with full source files and clear pricing. Based in Pakistan, working
> worldwide. Live at https://smarnb.onrender.com

This site is a single-origin React (Vite) front end served by a FastAPI backend.
All marketing pages are server-rendered with structured data (JSON-LD), so the
content below is the canonical map of what the site offers.

## Pages

- [Home](https://smarnb.onrender.com/): intro, selected work, personal projects, process, about, experience, client reviews, FAQ, and the custom-request contact form.
- [Store](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store): full service catalogue, fixed packages with transparent pricing, products & licenses, cart and checkout, and order tracking.

## Services

- [SaaS dashboards](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#svc-saas-dashboard): Python web apps and admin dashboards (FastAPI/Flask + modern front ends).
- [Selenium & automation bots](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#svc-selenium-bots): browser automation, scraping, and repetitive-task bots.
- [Computer vision & AI](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#svc-ai-cv): OCR, image/document processing, and applied computer-vision features.
- [Figma UI/UX design](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#svc-figma-uiux): product and web interface design, prototypes, and design systems.
- [Packaging design](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#svc-packaging-design): print-ready product packaging and brand collateral.

## Products

- [CodeWatch (licensed product)](https://smarnb.onrender.com/store#products): a finished computer-vision liveness/proctoring product, licensed per deployment (source code is never shared).

## Contact

- Email: shahjee975@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +92 341 4527256
- [Custom request form](https://smarnb.onrender.com/#contact): describe your scope for a tailored quote and timeline.

## Notes for agents

- Pricing and the live service catalogue are also available as JSON at /api/services.
- The client area (/app) and developer dashboard (/admin) are private tools and are intentionally excluded from indexing.
- See https://smarnb.onrender.com/sitemap_index.xml for the full URL list.
